title: AWEIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 09 Executive, Jr. Executive and More Posts
org: Advanced Weapons & Equipment India Limited (AWEIL), Corporate HQ, Kanpur
shortInfo: AWEIL is recruiting 09 posts across Legal Expert, Executive (Official Language), Executive (Corporate Communication), Jr. Executive (HR) and Sr. Manager (IT) on full time contract basis, last date 15 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: AWEIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 09 Executive, Jr. Executive and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Weapons & Equipment India Limited (AWEIL), Corporate HQ, Kanpur
basic_details.post_name: Sr. Manager (IT), Executive (Corporate Communication), Legal Expert, Executive (Official Language), Jr. Executive (HR)
basic_details.short_information: AWEIL is recruiting 09 posts across Legal Expert, Executive (Official Language), Executive (Corporate Communication), Jr. Executive (HR) and Sr. Manager (IT) on full time contract basis, last date 15 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated separately to shortlisted candidates

age_limit.details: The upper age limit varies by post and is calculated as on 15-06-2026. No lower age limit has been specified. Age relaxation for reserved categories (OBC/SC/ST/PwD/Ex-Servicemen) shall be as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: All candidates must be Indian citizens. Eligibility conditions including educational qualification, experience and age limit differ by post as given below. All age limits are as on the last date of advertisement i.e. 15-06-2026.

vacancy_details.Key Responsibilities: Overseeing IT infrastructure at AWEIL HQ; leading IT staff; MIS development; server maintenance; LAN and communication monitoring; IT asset management; ERP technical support; website monitoring

Social media management; digital content & poster creation; event management; stakeholder communication; brand building; advertisement; media coverage monitoring; crisis communication; internal communications; protocol and coordination

Drafting and vetting legal documents, agreements, MOUs, JV Agreements, EOI & RFP conditions, lease agreements, bye-laws; rendering legal opinions on corporate, contractual, service, disciplinary, taxation and arbitration matters; handling legal notices; appearing and defending AWEIL before Courts/Tribunals/Forums/Statutory Bodies

Implementation of Official Language Policy of the Government of India; translation of official correspondence, scientific literature and documents from English to Hindi and vice versa; preparation of Official Language reports and correspondence

HR strategy implementation; recruitment, selection, promotion and performance appraisal; compliance with Labour Laws; RTI; liaison with enforcement agencies; welfare services for employees/ex-employees; CSR initiatives; grievance redressal; implementation of Government policies; handling court cases

selection_process: Stage 1 Shortlisting based on Educational Qualification and Experience as per notification criteria All Posts
Stage 2 Personal Interview by a duly constituted selection committee All Posts
Selection for all posts will be based on shortlisting from applications received

followed by a Personal Interview conducted by a duly constituted selection committee. There is no written examination. Shortlisting criteria may be enhanced by the Competent Authority if a large number of candidates fulfil the eligibility criteria. The decision of AWEIL on all matters related to eligibility
shortlisting and selection shall be final and binding.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply in Hard Copy only using the prescribed application format for the respective post. The application form can be downloaded from the official AWEIL website (www.aweil.in) or the DoO(C&S) website (ddpdoo.gov.in). Completed applications must be sent via Speed Post or Courier only - no other mode is accepted.
Send Application To:
Director (HR), Advanced Weapons and Equipment India Limited, Ordnance Factory Kanpur (OFC) Premises, Kalpi Road, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh – 208009
Documents to be Submitted Along with Application:
Completed application form in prescribed format with passport photograph (4.4 cm x 5.8 cm) affixed at designated space and second photograph attached (not pasted)
Self-attested copy of age proof - Birth Certificate or 10th Class Certificate
Self-attested copies of all educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (Graduation level onwards)
Self-attested copies of all experience certificates and documentary proof of experience
Self-attested copy of Bar Council Registration Certificate (for Legal Expert post)
Self-attested copy of caste certificate in prescribed format (for OBC candidates applying for Jr. Executive HR)
Aadhar Card Number and PAN Number details (mandatory in application form)
No Objection Certificate from current employer (for Govt./PSU employees - mandatory at interview stage)
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Interview:
All original documents of educational qualifications and experience for verification
Two self-attested copies of all documents
Original NOC from employer (for Govt./PSU/Quasi-Govt. employees)
For candidates from Govt./PSU/private sector who are finally selected - document evidencing acceptance of resignation from previous employer (mandatory before joining)
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and on contract basis - it does not confer any right or claim of extension or absorption in AWEIL. The contract can be terminated by AWEIL by giving 1 month's notice or payment of 1 month's salary in lieu thereof. Candidates wishing to leave must give 3 months' notice or pay 3 months' salary in lieu. Selected candidates will be required to sign a contractual agreement in the prescribed format. Candidates currently serving in Govt./Quasi-Govt./PSU must seek prior NOC from their employer before applying and must submit it at the time of interview - failure to do so will result in cancellation of candidature. Candidates from Govt./PSU/private entities who are finally selected must produce the acceptance of their resignation from their last employer before joining AWEIL. For candidates selected from the private sector, appointment is effective only after verification of Character and Antecedents from the concerned District Authority (applicable for Executive Corporate Communication post). Any misrepresentation, suppression of facts, use of fraudulent documents or impersonation at any stage will result in permanent debarment and/or legal/criminal prosecution, and dismissal if discovered after joining. AWEIL reserves the right to reject any application or candidature at any stage without assigning any reason. Decision of AWEIL in all matters related to recruitment shall be final and binding. Applications not in prescribed format, incomplete, without required attested certificates, received after 15-06-2026, or not routed through the present employer (for Govt./PSU employees) will be summarily rejected. New Labour Codes will be applicable to all newly engaged contract employees. AWEIL will not be responsible for any delay in receipt or loss of applications in postal transit. No correspondence will be entertained regarding shortlisting, interview schedule or selection decisions.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of offline applications is June 15, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 09 vacancies have been announced across multiple posts including Legal Expert, Executive, and Sr. Manager.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply offline through hard copy sent via Speed Post or Courier only.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered under AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly consolidated salary ranges from ₹60,000 to ₹1,10,000, depending on the post, with a 10% annual increment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes: Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience Personal Interview

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit varies by post: 35 years for Executive & Jr. Executive posts 45 years for Sr. Manager, Legal Expert, and Official Language posts

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the contract in AWEIL jobs?
faq.answer: The contract is initially for 1 year (2 years for Sr. Manager IT), extendable up to 4 years based on performance.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for AWEIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category.
